site.title: Elias Hart Photography
site.description: A portfolio website for a photographer with category-based galleries powered by JSON content.
site.heading: Quiet light, bold moments, and image-led storytelling.
site.intro: This homepage is driven by a single JSON file. Add your image to public/images/<category-folder>, then add one object into that category's items array and it will appear automatically.
site.location: Based in Los Angeles, available worldwide
site.instructions: How to update: create or use a category object inside images, set its folder name, place image files in public/images/<folder>, then add image objects into that category's items array. Adding a new category object creates a new section automatically.
